reasoning: As of May 15, 2025, there is no evidence that Anthropic has filed a Form S-1 or made any announcement regarding an IPO on its official news page. Such large private injections of capital typically extend a company's private runway and signal that a public offering is not imminent. Furthermore, high-profile interviews with CEO Dario Amodei in early 2025 focused on AGI development and capital-intensive compute needs rather than public market transitions. Reports as late as May 7, 2025, confirmed the absence of any IPO filing. Given the 6-week window remaining until the July 1 deadline and the lack of typical pre-IPO signals (such as bank hiring rumors or S-1 leaks), the probability of an announcement is extremely low.
